The R2 is expected to play a central role in Rivian’s strategy to reach a broader customer base, with pricing and positioning aimed well below its current R1 lineup."},{"url":"https://www.wardsauto.com/news/rivian-names-greg-revelle-chief-customer-officer-r2-rj-scaringe/809536/","title":"Rivian hires chief customer officer ahead of R2 launch | WardsAuto","content":"Rivian hires chief customer officer ahead of R2 launch
Rivian has named Greg Revelle as its chief customer officer effective Jan.
12, the EV maker announced in a press release Monday.
Revelle is current board member for online retailer Cars.com and is the founder of Revatek, a Wisconsin-based startup that developed alternator regulators for marine, RV and recreational off-grid battery charging.

And in November, Rivian reported a Q3 net loss of $1.17 billion as well as a $130 million loss in automotive gross profit."},{"url":"https://www.autoremarketing.com/ar/retail/rivian-adds-former-autonation-executive-revelle-as-chief-customer-officer/","title":"Auto Remarketing","content":"Rivian's R2 SUV is projected to hit the market in 2026.
“Greg has a proven track record of leading large teams in a dynamic environment.”"},{"url":"https://www.mediapost.com/publications/article/412064/rivian-adds-marketing-leader.html","title":"Rivian Adds Marketing Leader 01/16/2026","content":"Rivian has added to its C-suite with a new marketing-driven position: chief customer officer.
Greg Revelle joins the electric vehicle maker from Revatek, a startup he founded dedicated to enhancing the off-grid outdoor experience.
He has also held leadership roles at Kohl's, Best Buy, AutoNation and Expedia, in addition to being a current board member at Cars.com.
Revelle will oversee the entirety of the customer journey at Rivian, leading its go-to-market strategy, including sales, marketing and operations.
Rivian Founder and CEO RJ Scaringe had announced in October that he was taking on the role of interim chief marketing officer while the company recruited a new executive.
While Revelle’s recent position was more tech-focused, he has a retail marketing background, having served as CMO of Kohl’s for five years and CMO of Best Buy for three years.
Revelle will be instrumental in bringing the company’s more mass market R2 model to market.
"The company has built versatile, intuitive vehicles that solve real-world needs for customers, seamlessly bridging the gap between daily utility and outdoor adventure.”","date":"3 days ago"}]}

# Rivian Names Greg Revelle Chief Customer Officer. Rivian appoints Greg Revelle as Chief Customer Officer to lead sales, marketing, and operations as the company prepares to launch its midsize R2 SUV in early 2026. * The EV ReportThe EV Report. **Rivian** has appointed **Greg Revelle** as Chief Customer Officer, effective immediately. Revelle will oversee the company’s entire customer journey, including sales, marketing, and operations as Rivian prepares to launch its midsize R2 SUV in the first half of 2026. ## Highlights. * **New leadership role:** Revelle joins Rivian from Revatek, an energy storage startup he founded, bringing experience from Kohl’s, Best Buy, AutoNation, and Expedia. * **R2 launch preparation:** Appointment comes as Rivian readies production of its midsize platform vehicles targeting early 2026 delivery. * **Expanded oversight:** CCO role encompasses go-to-market strategy, sales, marketing, and operations across consumer and commercial segments. ## Executive Background. Revelle brings leadership experience spanning eCommerce, retail, and automotive sectors. His previous roles include executive positions at Kohl’s, Best Buy, AutoNation, and Expedia. He currently serves as a board member at Cars.com. Prior to joining Rivian, Revelle founded Revatek, a startup focused on energy storage solutions for off-grid outdoor applications. ## R2 Platform Timeline. Rivian’s midsize platform will underpin both the R2 and R3 product lines. The R2, a five-passenger SUV, is expected to reach the market in the first half of 2026. The vehicle is designed to balance performance and utility for both daily driving and outdoor use. # Rivian Hires Greg Revelle as Chief Customer Officer Ahead of R2 Launch. The move comes as Rivian prepares to scale sales and marketing operations in advance of the R2 SUV’s planned debut in the first half of 2026. Rivian has appointed Greg Revelle as Chief Customer Officer, strengthening its leadership team ahead of the highly anticipated launch of its next-generation midsize vehicles. The move comes as Rivian prepares to scale sales and marketing operations in advance of the R2 SUV’s planned debut in the first half of 2026. ### **Rivian taps eCommerce and auto veteran to lead customer strategy**. Revelle joins Rivian with a background spanning eCommerce, retail, automotive, and travel. His prior executive roles include leadership positions at Kohl’s, Best Buy, AutoNation, and Expedia, and he currently serves on the board of Cars.com. In his new role, Revelle will oversee Rivian’s entire customer journey, including sales, marketing, and go-to-market operations. Rivian founder and CEO RJ Scaringe said Revelle’s experience leading large teams in fast-moving environments will be key as the company enters its next growth phase. According to a press release, the appointment signals Rivian’s focus on tightening execution and improving the end-to-end ownership experience as it moves beyond its initial premium offerings. ### **Leadership move aligns with R2 launch and platform expansion**. Revelle’s arrival comes at a critical moment for Rivian, which is gearing up to produce and launch the R2, a five-passenger electric SUV built on its new midsize platform. The R2 is expected to play a central role in Rivian’s strategy to reach a broader customer base, with pricing and positioning aimed well below its current R1 lineup. The midsize platform will also underpin the upcoming R3 models, giving Rivian a scalable foundation for higher-volume production. Revelle said he was drawn to Rivian’s emphasis on software-defined vehicles and AI-driven systems, as well as its ability to balance daily usability with outdoor capability. As Rivian transitions from niche volumes to mass-market ambitions, aligning product, marketing, and customer operations will be critical. The addition of a dedicated Chief Customer Officer underscores how seriously the company is taking that challenge as it heads into what could be its most consequential launch cycle yet.","score":0.8936907,"raw_content":null,"domain":"ev.com","popularity_score":4.523340167740459,"main_topic":"people research"},{"url":"https://riviantrackr.com/news/rivian-appoints-greg-revelle-as-chief-customer-officer-ahead-of-r2-launch","title":"Rivian Appoints Greg Revelle as Chief Customer Officer Ahead of R2 Launch","content":"Use code **JOSE1715716** to earn up to 500 points + 3 months of free RAN charging.
